items.description: New in Gemini: Generate files and export them Tell Gemini what you want to create and the format, and it now does the work for you. Now supporting: 📄 Google Docs, Word (.docx) & PDFs 📊 Google Sheets, Excel (.xlsx) & CSV 🖥️ Google Slides…
items.description_zh: Gemini 的新增功能：生成文件并导出它们 告诉 Gemini 您想要创建什么以及格式，它现在就会为您完成工作。现在支持： 📄 Google Docs、Word (.docx) 和 PDF 📊 Google Sheets、Excel (.xlsx) 和 CSV 🖥️ Google Slides...

items.title: It turns out, the job of a radiologist isn't to read x-rays.
items.title_zh: 事实证明，放射科医生的工作不是阅读 X 光片。
items.description: It turns out, the job of a radiologist isn't to read x-rays. It's to cure people. And if AI can help speed the process of understanding x-rays, radiologists can see and cure more people. https://t.co/gO0iC4HNsw
items.description_zh: 事实证明，放射科医生的工作不是阅读 X 光片。是来给人治病的。如果人工智能可以帮助加快理解 X 射线的过程，放射科医生就可以看到并治愈更多的人。 https://t.co/gO0iC4HNsw

meta.bio: VP Science @OpenAI, BoD @Cisco @nature_org, LTC @USArmyReserve Ex: Pres @Planet, Head of Produc…
